final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input D,
    input EN,
    input RESET,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Q_n
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (RESET) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
            Q_n <= 1'b1;
        end else if (EN) begin
            Q <= D;
            Q_n <= ~D;
        end
    end

endmodule
